scripts.test:e2e:prepare: pnpm generate:slides -- --topic "E2E Regression Deck" --summary "A generated deck used to verify the full editor pipeline from skill output through in-app editing." --points "Generated input|Editor import|Round-trip text editing"
scripts.test:e2e:serve: pnpm test:e2e:prepare && pnpm build && pnpm --filter web exec vite preview --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173 --strictPort
